prompt: Optimize this React Three Fiber scene. It has a rotating cube that updates state every frame, causing unnecessary re-renders of the main UI. It also loads a large uncompressed .glb file without Suspense.

assertions.name: Removes React State from useFrame
assertions.text: The animation logic no longer uses `useState` inside `useFrame`, instead using `useRef` to directly manipulate Three.js objects.

assertions.name: Implements Suspense/Preloading
assertions.text: The model loading logic utilizes `<Suspense />` or preloading techniques for better UX during asset loading.

assertions.name: Optimizes Canvas DPR
assertions.text: The `<Canvas />` component should ideally set `dpr` appropriately for different screen densities.
